title: Corning (GLW) Beats on Q1 Earnings, Raises 2022 Sales View
text: Corning's (GLW) first-quarter 2022 results benefit from strong growth in Optical Communications, Display Technologies and Hemlock's solar materials.

title: Corning Incorporated (GLW) CEO Wendell Weeks on Q1 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Corning Incorporated (NYSE:GLW ) Q1 2022 Earnings Conference Call April 26, 2022 8:30 AM ET Company Participants Ann Nicholson - Vice President, Investor Relations Wendell Weeks - Chairman and CEO Edward Schlesinger - EVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Rod Hall - Goldman Sachs Mehdi Hosseini - Susquehanna International Group, LLP Asiya Merchant - Cititgroup Martin Yang - Oppenheimer Steven Fox - Fox Advisors Josh Spector - UBS Samik Chatterjee - JPMorgan Tim Long - Barclays Wamsi Mohan - Bank of America Matthew Niknam - Deutsche Bank Meta Marshall - Morgan Stanley Operator Welcome to the Corning Incorporated's Q1 2021 (sic) [2022] Earnings Call. [Operator Instructions] It is my pleasure to introduce you to Ann Nicholson, Vice President of Investor Relations.

title: Corning (GLW) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Corning (GLW) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 10.20% and 5.09%, respectively, for the quarter ended March 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Corning shares jump 8.7% premarket after earnings beat
text: Shares of glass maker Corning Inc. GLW, +1.83% jumped 8.7% premarket Tuesday, after the company reported better-than-expected first-quarter earnings, boosted by strength in Optical Communications. The company posted net income of $581 million, or 68 cents a share, for the quarter, up from $487 million, or 56 cents a share, in the year-earlier period.

title: Corning's Strong First-Quarter Sales and Improved Profitability Highlight Outstanding Start to 2022
text: Core sales grew 15% year over year to $3.7 billion and core EPS increased 20% year over year to $0.54; First-quarter free cash flow of $171 million puts company on pace for another year of strong cash generation; Management now expects full-year sales to exceed $15 billion, with sales growing at a high-single digit percentage and profitability growing faster than sales Core sales grew 15% year over year to $3.7 billion and core EPS increased 20% year over year to $0.54; First-quarter free cash flow of $171 million puts company on pace for another year of strong cash generation; Management now expects full-year sales to exceed $15 billion, with sales growing at a high-single digit percentage and profitability growing faster than sales

title: Will Higher Revenues Drive Corning's (GLW) Q1 Earnings?
text: Corning's (GLW) performance in first-quarter 2022 is likely to have been driven by growth in Optical Communications, Display Technologies and Specialty Materials businesses.
